prompt_text:
### Demographics: 79-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 12 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II)
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Major Depressive Disorder
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 1 years ago; 15 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~18.8 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 61.4 kg; Height 170.2 cm; BMI 21.2 kg/m²; Blood pressure 130/80 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.3%; 9 months ago 8.9%; 6 months ago 8.4%; 3 months ago 7.9%; current 6.9%), FPG (12 months ago 262mg/dL; 9 months ago 248mg/dL; 6 months ago 212mg/dL; 3 months ago 181mg/dL; current 173mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 64.3kg; 9 months ago 61.9kg; 6 months ago 64.7kg; 3 months ago 63.8kg; current 61.4kg), Height (12 months ago 170.2cm; 9 months ago 170.2cm; 6 months ago 170.2cm; 3 months ago 170.2cm; current 170.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 22.0kg/m²; current 21.2kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 132mmHg; 9 months ago 132mmHg; 6 months ago 132mmHg; 3 months ago 132mmHg; current 130mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 80mmHg; 9 months ago 80mmHg; 6 months ago 79mmHg; 3 months ago 80mmHg; current 80mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 74U/L; 9 months ago 73U/L; 6 months ago 78U/L; 3 months ago 78U/L; current 77U/L), AST (12 months ago 90U/L; 9 months ago 95U/L; 6 months ago 87U/L; 3 months ago 92U/L; current 92U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.3mg/dL; current 1.3mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 13mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 12mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 8.0mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 8.0mL/min/1.73m²; current 9mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 560mg/g; 9 months ago 782mg/g; 6 months ago 781mg/g; 3 months ago 759mg/g; current 604mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 87mg/dL; 9 months ago 86mg/dL; 6 months ago 88mg/dL; 3 months ago 92mg/dL; current 89mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 59mg/dL; 9 months ago 59mg/dL; 6 months ago 59mg/dL; 3 months ago 56mg/dL; current 58mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 177mg/dL; 9 months ago 158mg/dL; 6 months ago 173mg/dL; 3 months ago 158mg/dL; current 166mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.2g/dL; current 10.8g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.34 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
